summary: Buy consensus from 40 analysts as of Apr 29, 2026. Avg price target $840.20. Jan 26 2026: Rothschild & Co upgraded from Neutral to Buy. Post-earnings: one analyst issued Hold in $700-range amid capex concerns. Shares fell ~7% AH on Q1 2026 capex raise.
